title: Cole Brown
compiled_truth: Cole Brown is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-09-16 to 2001-12-03), Cole Brown sent 13 and received 49 emails, totalling 62 interactions. Top correspondents: [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (13), [Tim O'Rourke](people/tim-o-rourke) (7), [Kriste Sullivan](people/kriste-sullivan) (5), [Lizzette Palmer](people/lizzette-palmer) (2), [Exec Jones](people/exec-jones) (2). Mailbox folders observed: deleted_items, inbox.
